productName: Nano Tincture - Paradise 2:1:1 (200mg CBD;100mg THC;100mg CBN
description: A discreet infused drop formula with a modern herbal-apothecary feel, easy to measure and simple to work into any routine. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 2:1:1 ratio. Discreet, precise, and easy to dose.
